# Nexaguard Cyber Labs

> A Dubai-based cybersecurity consultancy serving UAE and GCC mid-market businesses. We provide penetration testing (VAPT), ISO 27001 readiness, GRC consulting, and managed security services for fintechs, SaaS companies, healthcare organisations, and growing businesses.

## About
Nexaguard Cyber Labs FZCO is registered in IFZA Freezone, Dubai. Founded September 2025. Based in Dubai Silicon Oasis. Serves clients across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Kuwait.

## Core Services
- Application Security & Penetration Testing (Web, Mobile, API, Source Code)
- Cyber Risk Management & GRC (ISO 27001, NESA, ADGM, DIFC, PCI DSS)
- Managed Security Services (Managed VAPT, 24/7 SOC, Managed AppSec)
- Cloud and Infrastructure Security
- Human Defense & Cyber Awareness Training

## Compliance Frameworks
NESA UAE IAS, ADGM Cyber Risk Framework, DIFC Data Protection, ADHICS, ISO/IEC 27001:2022, PCI DSS v4.0, UAE PDPL, GDPR, SOC 2.

## Contact
- Email: info@nexaguardcyberlabs.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +971 50 623 3538
- Website: https://nexaguardcyberlabs.com

## Key Pages
- /about-us: Company background and mission
- /services: Full service portfolio
- /services/application-security: VAPT, web/mobile/API penetration testing
- /services/cyber-risk-management: GRC, ISO 27001, NESA, compliance
- /services/managed-services: Managed VAPT, SOC, ongoing protection
- /services/cloud-infrastructure-security: Cloud security, network penetration testing, ICS/SCADA assessments, infrastructure hardening
- /services/human-defense-awareness: Cybersecurity awareness training, phishing simulations, social engineering assessments
- /resources: Free UAE cybersecurity resources — compliance checklist, web app security guide, VAPT self-assessment
- /resources/vapt-readiness-assessment: Free 15-question VAPT readiness self-assessment. Returns personalised score and recommendations.
- /contact: Contact information and consultation booking
